commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `OPENCLAW_TRAJECTORY_RUNTIME_EVENT_MAX_BYTES` parsing for core and Codex trajectory writers, tests suffix/raw-byte parsing, and documents the new trajectory limit setting.

Reproducibility: yes. for the current source behavior: current main hard-codes 256 KiB caps in both core and Codex trajectory writers, and the truncation path is clear from source. I did not run a live OpenClaw reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-supplied after-fix proof plus maintainer judgment on the new env config surface; automation should not repair this PR until the contributor proof gate is satisfied.
